channel.title: Home on Nemanja Tomic - Blogging About Tech
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Nemanja Tomic - Blogging About Tech

item.title: Building Calm Operational Routines
item.description: Reliable IT work often comes from repeatable habits that reduce stress before incidents ever happen.

item.title: How to Think About Technical Debt Without Panic
item.description: Technical debt becomes easier to manage when it is treated as a portfolio of trade-offs instead of a moral failure.

item.title: Why Clear Documentation Still Matters
item.description: Documentation is not busywork; it is part of the interface between systems, teams, and future decisions.

item.title: About
item.description: A short introduction to Nemanja Tomic and the perspective behind this blog.

item.title: Contact
item.description: Get in touch about technical writing, collaboration, or thoughtful discussions around IT and philosophy.
